items.name: The Cheshire’s Karmic Spiral Wings
items.description:
They say these wings were not forged, but laughed into existence.
When the Cheshire Cat first learned that Wonderland’s balance had tipped too far — too many broken promises, too many stolen hearts, too many tyrants who believed themselves immune to consequence — he curled his grin into a spiral and whispered a single idea into the fabric of the realm: “Let karma have teeth.”
From that whisper, the Wings appeared.
A wing of impossible geometry, striped like the Cat’s own vanishing tail, wound itself into a perfect spiral. Thorn like wing tips erupted along its bone — not sharp in the physical sense, but sharp in the way a truth can cut. Each thorn remembers a wrong. Each stripe remembers who committed it. And each twist of the spiral remembers the path that led them there.

Group: Crimsyn & Lavender
Permission to use provided by: Trive

All copyrights and ownership belong to Crimsyn & Lavender
DMCA active upon copyright infringement
